title: 10 years of AlphaGo: The turning point for AI | Thore Graepel & Pushmeet Kohli
summary: Google DeepMind's retrospective on the 10-year anniversary of AlphaGo's victory over Lee Sedol in March 2016. The documentary reflects on how the AlphaGo match catalyzed the modern AI revolution, enabling subsequent breakthroughs in algorithmic discovery and protein folding.
